landing.heroSubtitle: Predict prices  -  Find best mandi  -  Check weather  -  Simulate profits  -  Discover government schemes  -  Voice assistant  -  Analytics
landing.heroDesc: Stop selling at the wrong price, at the wrong mandi, at the wrong time. AgroPulse AI empowers farmers with real-time market intelligence.
landing.featuresDesc: 8 powerful AI-driven modules to help you make confident, profitable decisions every season.
landing.stepsDesc: From registration to actionable selling recommendations in minutes.
landing.testimonialsDesc: Real results from real farmers who use AgroPulse AI every season.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to Maximise Your Farm's Profits?
landing.ctaDesc: Join over 10 lakh farmers already making smarter selling decisions with AgroPulse AI.

features.aiPricePredictionDesc: ML models trained on years of mandi data predict commodity prices up to 30 days ahead with high accuracy.
features.weatherIntelligenceDesc: Understand how upcoming weather patterns affect crop supply and demand so you can time your sales perfectly.
features.smartMandiFinderDesc: Compare real-time prices across hundreds of mandis and find the most profitable market for your produce.
features.profitSimulatorDesc: Input your yield, transport cost, and storage to receive a personalised selling strategy that maximises profit.
features.governmentSchemesDesc: Discover PM-KISAN, MSP, crop insurance, and 50+ government schemes tailored to your state and crop.
features.voiceAssistantDesc: Ask questions in your language and get instant AI-powered answers about prices, weather, and market trends.
features.smartAnalyticsDesc: Track your platform usage, prediction accuracy, and profit trends with a comprehensive analytics dashboard.
features.reportsExportDesc: Download PDF, Excel, and CSV reports of your predictions, profit simulations, and activity history.

steps.registerFreeDesc: Create your farmer account with your phone number in under 2 minutes.
steps.selectCropDesc: Choose your commodity from our database of 200+ agricultural products.
steps.aiAnalysesDesc: Our ML models process years of price trends, seasonal patterns, and market cycles.
steps.maximiseProfitDesc: Get actionable insights on where, when, and how much to sell for maximum profitability.

faqs.q1: Is AgroPulse AI free to use?
faqs.a1: Yes, AgroPulse AI is completely free for all farmers. Register with your phone number and get instant access.
faqs.q2: How accurate are the AI price predictions?
faqs.a2: Our ML models achieve an average accuracy of 91% based on historical mandi data and seasonal patterns.
faqs.a3: We currently support Onion, Potato, Pulses, and Maize with more commodities being added regularly.
faqs.q4: Can I use it on my mobile phone?
faqs.a4: Yes, AgroPulse AI is fully responsive and works perfectly on all mobile devices and tablets.
faqs.q5: How do I find the best mandi near me?
faqs.a5: Use the Smart Mandi Finder feature on the dashboard. It recommends the highest-paying mandi for your commodity.

footer.platformDesc: Smart Agricultural Market Intelligence Platform - empowering farmers with AI-driven insights.

voice.title: AgroPulse Voice AI
voice.hint: Tap the mic and ask about prices, weather, mandis, or schemes
voice.noSupport: Speech recognition not supported - use Chrome or Edge
voice.greeting: Hello! I am AgroPulse AI Voice Assistant. Ask me about crop prices, weather, mandis, government schemes, or profit calculations.
voice.errorNoSupport: Speech recognition is not supported in this browser. Please use Chrome or Edge.
voice.errorGeneral: Sorry, I could not process your request. Please try again.
